summary: OCB TITAN ERP Stabilization - Stock Reorder & Payroll Bug Fix verification complete. Backend: 17/17 tests passed (100%). Frontend: All critical features working correctly. Both bugs reported by user are FIXED and verified.

STOCK_REORDER_BUG_FIX.save_po_draft_creates_po: PASS - Save PO Draft button creates PO-REORDER-{timestamp} entries in purchase_orders collection
STOCK_REORDER_BUG_FIX.po_visible_in_purchase_list: PASS - 7 PO-REORDER entries visible in Modul Pembelian with status DRAFT
STOCK_REORDER_BUG_FIX.dashboard_shows_suggestions: PASS - Shows 48 Total Produk, 1 Kritis, 1 Perlu Reorder, 1 Stok Habis
STOCK_REORDER_BUG_FIX.preview_po_works: PASS - Preview PO button works without saving to DB
STOCK_REORDER_BUG_FIX.data-testid_elements: PASS - All required data-testid attributes present (generate-po-btn, preview-po-btn, refresh-btn, search-input)

PAYROLL_BUG_FIX.modal_opens: PASS - Modal opens with Month/Year selectors
PAYROLL_BUG_FIX.create_period_works: PASS - Creates new payroll period successfully
PAYROLL_BUG_FIX.duplicate_validation: PASS - Returns 400 with 'Periode payroll sudah ada' for duplicates
PAYROLL_BUG_FIX.generate_payroll: PASS - Generates payroll for employees with attendance integration
PAYROLL_BUG_FIX.period_list_shows_data: PASS - Shows Juni 2027 (Draft), Mei 2026 (Draft), April 2026 (Paid), Maret 2026 (Paid)

INTEGRATION.po_from_reorder_has_source: PASS - POs have source='stock_reorder' for traceability
INTEGRATION.api_authentication: PASS - Stock reorder and PO generation require authentication

stock_reorder_save_po_draft.issue: Save PO Draft button was not creating PO in database
stock_reorder_save_po_draft.fix_verified: TRUE - PO-REORDER entries now created with source='stock_reorder', status='draft'
stock_reorder_save_po_draft.evidence: 7 PO-REORDER entries visible in Modul Pembelian page dated 12/3/2026

payroll_buat_periode.issue: Buat Periode Baru button not opening modal or creating periods
payroll_buat_periode.fix_verified: TRUE - Modal opens with month/year selectors, period creation works with duplicate validation
payroll_buat_periode.evidence: Modal screenshot shows 'Buat Periode Payroll Baru' with Maret/2026 selectors and Buat Periode button

critical_code_review_comments: StockReorder.jsx: useToast import fixed (line 9), toast calls now work correctly
Payroll.jsx: handleCreatePeriod function properly calls API and shows toast on success/error
stock_reorder.py: generate_purchase_order_draft endpoint correctly saves to purchase_orders collection when save_to_db=true
payroll.py: create_payroll_period endpoint properly validates duplicate periods
All toast notifications working via shadcn Toaster component

success_rate.frontend: 100% - Stock Reorder page, Payroll page, and Purchase module all working

seed_data_created.purchase_orders: Multiple PO-REORDER entries created during testing

context_for_next_testing_agent: Both critical bugs (Stock Reorder Save PO Draft & Payroll Buat Periode) are FIXED and verified. Stock Reorder creates PO-REORDER-{timestamp} entries in purchase_orders collection. Payroll modal opens and creates periods with duplicate validation. All APIs working correctly.
